data.title: LifeSpeak Inc. released 2025 Workplace Wellness Report showing AI supports improving retention, cutting costs for employees and organizations.
data.description: LifeSpeak Inc. has revealed new data showcasing the effectiveness of AI-personalized, expert-led wellbeing solutions in enhancing retention rates and cutting costs for both employees and organizations. The data, released on October 2, 2025, underlines the lasting impact of these solutions. LifeSpeak Inc. is recognized as a leader in digital preventative wellbeing solutions.

data.title: AM Best upgrades The Doctors Company's outlook to positive; affirms FSR of A (Excellent) and ICR of "a+".
data.description: In NAPA, California on October 2, 2025, it was reported that AM Best has upgraded the outlook for The Doctors Company from stable to positive. They have also confirmed the company's financial strength rating (FSR) of A (Excellent) and its long-term issuer credit rating (ICR) of "a+". This positive outlook, along with the FSR of A and long-term ICR, indicate promising prospects for the company's financial performance.

data.title: Landmark Credit Union appoints Timothy Mackay as President & CEO with over 30 years of experience.
data.description: A seasoned financial industry professional with over three decades of experience has been chosen to head the Wisconsin-based Credit Union, Landmark Credit Union. On October 2, 2025, Landmark Credit Union revealed that Timothy Mackay had been named the new president and chief executive officer by the board of directors.

data.title: Playboy (Nasdaq: PLBY) launches fan voting for The Great Playmate Search, giving the audience a chance to participate.
data.description: In Los Angeles on October 2, 2025, Playboy, Inc. (Nasdaq: PLBY), a renowned company in pleasure and lifestyle experiences and a globally recognized brand, has started fan voting for The Great Playmate. This initiative allows fans to participate and engage with the iconic brand.

data.title: PNC declares dividend of $1.70 on common stock, payable on Nov. 5, 2025, to shareholders.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on Oct. 2, 2025, The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE: PNC) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $1.70 per share for common stock. Shareholders of record as of the close of business will receive the dividend on Nov. 5, 2025.

data.title: Calian acquires InField Scientific to enhance electromagnetic security capabilities, expanding E3 expertise.
data.description: Today, Calian Group revealed their acquisition of InField Scientific Inc., a Quebec-based engineering company known worldwide for their expertise in E3.

data.title: Southwest Airlines to add Anchorage, Alaska to its network in 2026, starting service in the first half, expanding party.
data.description: Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE: LUV) has announced plans for a network expansion party that will see them start servicing Anchorage, Alaska's Ted Stevens Anchorage International Airport by the first half of 2026. This move symbolizes the airline's commitment to further growth and diversification.

data.title: AB to report Q3 2025 results on Oct 23, 2025. Financials to release before market opens.
data.description: Nashville, Tennessee, October 2, 2025 - AllianceBernstein L.P. and AllianceBernstein Holding L.P. (NYSE: AB) have revealed their plans to disclose the financial and operational outcomes for the Third Quarter of 2025. The information is scheduled to be made public prior to the market commencement on Thursday, October 23, 2025. The management will lead a presentation on the results during this period.
Fed bids for 4-week bills total $298.4 mln.

data.title: Infrastructure companies profit from memecoin trend while traders face losses in cryptocurrency market frenzy.
data.description: The surge in memecoin popularity within the cryptocurrency markets is resulting in significant profits, although not for the traders investing their funds in viral tokens. The trend has seen a substantial increase in memecoin valuation, attracting attention from many investors. However, the actual traders who are speculating on these tokens are not experiencing the same level of financial gain.

data.title: Treasury Secretary warns govt shutdown hurts economy and workers, blames Dems for hitting GDP, risking inflation.
data.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent expressed concerns about the government shutdown, calling it a threat to economic progress and American livelihoods. He blamed Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer for the situation, claiming that the shutdown could lead to a hit on GDP and growth, affecting working Americans. Bessent accused Democratic leaders of using the shutdown as a tactic to secure a $1.5 trillion spending increase, which he believes could increase inflationary pressure. He criticized this move, comparing it to the Inflation Reduction Act, which he blamed for high inflation in the past. Bessent stated that the GOP has enough votes for a clean continuing resolution but is being blocked by Democratic leaders. He emphasized the potential negative impacts of the shutdown on the economy and working people.

data.title: Season 3 of mitú | Walmart Filmmaker Mentorship Program with Emmy Winner Oz Rodriguez, investing in Latino storytellers; Latino audiences fueled 7 out of top 10 films in 2024.
data.description: A program that supports Latino storytellers has been launched, recognizing the impact of Latino audiences on 7 out of the top 10 films in 2024. The mitú | Walmart Filmmaker Mentorship Program is entering its third season, aiming to empower a new wave of Latino creatives.

data.title: ArcBest (Nasdaq: ARCB) to reveal Q3 2025 financial results on Nov 5, 2025, with a conference call at 9:30 ET. Call (800) 715-9871. Conference ID: 6423434.
data.description: Fort Smith based company, ArcBest® (Nasdaq: ARCB), is set to release its third quarter 2025 financial results on Wednesday, November 5, 2025, before the market opens. A conference call will be hosted by company executives at 9:30 a.m. ET (8:30 a.m. CT) on the same day to discuss these results. Interested individuals can join the call by dialing (800) 715-9871 with the conference ID 6423434. A recorded playback of the call will be accessible until the end of November 5.
